name: doc77-monorepo
description: Doc77 — Secure-by-default, conversation-driven local document management agent

scripts.dev-electron: node scripts/sync-version.cjs && pnpm --filter @doc77/core build && pnpm --filter @doc77/electron dev
scripts.dev:start: node scripts/kill-port.cjs 27777 && node -e "setTimeout(()=>{},1000)" && pnpm --filter @doc77/cli... build && node packages/cli/dist/bin/doc77.js start --bind 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:restart: node scripts/kill-port.cjs 27777 && node -e "setTimeout(()=>{},1000)" && pnpm --filter @doc77/cli... build && node packages/cli/dist/bin/doc77.js start --bind 0.0.0.0
